parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO public.cart_items (cart_id, sku, quantity, price_at_addition) 
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.cart_id }}', 
  '{{ $('Find Best Match').first().json.sku }}', 
  {{ Number($('Find Best Match').first().json.resolved_quantity || $('Start').first().json.tool_input.quantity || 0) }}, 
  {{ $('Find Best Match').first().json.price }}
) 
ON CONFLICT (cart_id, sku) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  quantity = CASE 
    WHEN '{{ (($('Start').first().json.tool_input.mode || 'set').toLowerCase()) }}' = 'set'
    THEN LEAST(EXCLUDED.quantity, {{ Number($('Find Best Match').first().json.stock || 0) }})
    ELSE LEAST(cart_items.quantity + EXCLUDED.quantity, {{ Number($('Find Best Match').first().json.stock || 0) }})
  END,
  price_at_addition = EXCLUDED.price_at_addition;
